functions.body:
local src="${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" rl="" dir=""
if command -v readlink >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -L "$src" ]; then
  rl="$(readlink "$src" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  [ -n "$rl" ] && case "$rl" in /*) src="$rl" ;; *) src="$(dirname "$src")/$rl" ;; esac
fi
dir="$(cd "$(dirname "$src")" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || printf '%s' "$(dirname "$src")")"
printf '%s' "$dir"

local dir="${1:-}"
local perm="${2:-700}"
if [ -z "$dir" ]; then
  return 1
fi
if [ -L "$dir" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: directory is a symlink: %s\n' "${C_RED:-}" "${C_RST:-}" "$dir" >&2
  if [ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" = "$0" ]; then
    exit "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
  else
    return "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
  fi
fi
if [ ! -d "$dir" ]; then
  mkdir -p "$dir" 2>/dev/null || {
    printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: cannot create directory: %s\n' "${C_RED:-}" "${C_RST:-}" "$dir" >&2
    if [ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" = "$0" ]; then
      exit "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
    else
      return "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
    fi
  }
  chmod "$perm" "$dir" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

local option="${1:-}"
local count="${2:-0}"
if [ "$count" -lt 2 ]; then
  log_error "ARGS" "Option $option requires an argument"
  exit "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
fi
printf '%s' "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}"
printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_config_dir)/provider"

local prov="${1:-}"
printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_config_dir)/model.${prov}"

local cfgdir=""
if type canonical_config_dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cfgdir="$(canonical_config_dir)"
else
  cfgdir="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR%/}/config}"
fi
printf '%s' "${cfgdir%/}/provider-url"

local var="${1:-}"
var="${var#"${var%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
var="${var%"${var##*[![:space:]]}"}"
printf '%s' "$var"

local prov="${1:-${PROVIDER:-groq}}"
prov="${prov//[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/}"
[ -n "$prov" ] || prov="groq"
MODELS_FILE="${BASH4LLM_MODELS_DIR:-}/${prov}.txt"
export MODELS_FILE

local f="${1:-}" size=""
if [ -z "$f" ]; then
  return 1
fi
if [ ! -f "$f" ] || [ ! -r "$f" ]; then
  return 2
fi
size="$(file_size "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
if [ "$size" -eq 0 ]; then
  return 3
fi
if [ -n "$(LC_ALL=C tr -d '\t\r\n\x20-\x7E\x80-\xFF' < "$f" | head -c 1)" ]; then
  return 4
fi
return 0

local prov="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
local name="${1:-}"
local cache_key="${prov}||${name}"
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_MODEL_CACHE[$cache_key]:-}" ]; then
  printf '%s' "${BASH4LLM_MODEL_CACHE[$cache_key]}"
  return 0
fi
local normalized=""
local trimmed="${name#"${name%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
trimmed="${trimmed%"${trimmed##*[![:space:]]}"}"
trimmed="${trimmed//$'\r'/}"
if type "normalize_model_${prov}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  normalized="$( "normalize_model_${prov}" "$trimmed" 2>/dev/null || true )"
fi
if [ -z "$normalized" ]; then
  normalized="$trimmed"
  normalized="${normalized#models/}"
  if [ "$prov" != "gemini" ]; then
    normalized="${normalized#$prov}"
  fi
  while [[ "$normalized" == [[:space:]:/~_-]* ]]; do
    normalized="${normalized#?}"
  done
fi
normalized="${normalized//[^a-zA-Z0-9._\/:+@=-]/}"
BASH4LLM_MODEL_CACHE["$cache_key"]="$normalized"
printf '%s' "$normalized"

local prov="${1:-}"
local envvar="" current_key="" input_key="" custom_var="" custom_env=""
[ -n "$prov" ] || return 1
envvar="$(provider_api_env_var_name "$prov")"
custom_var="PROVIDER_API_ENV_${prov}"
if [ -n "${custom_var:-}" ] && declare -p "$custom_var" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  custom_env="${!custom_var:-}"
fi
if [ -n "${custom_env:-}" ]; then
  envvar="$custom_env"
fi
current_key=""
if declare -p "$envvar" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  current_key="${!envvar:-}"
fi
if [ -n "$current_key" ]; then
  if [ "$prov" = "groq" ] && [ "$envvar" != "GROQ_API_KEY" ]; then
    export GROQ_API_KEY="$current_key"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if [ -z "$current_key" ] && [ "${BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE:-0}" -eq 1 ] && vault_exists; then
  if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_DECRYPTED_VAULT_JSON:-}" ]; then
    log_info_user "SECURITY" "Vault file detected. Authenticating to unlock saved API keys..."
    BASH4LLM_DECRYPTED_VAULT_JSON="$(vault_load_keys)" || true
  fi
  if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_DECRYPTED_VAULT_JSON:-}" ]; then
    local extracted_key=""
    extracted_key="$(printf '%s' "$BASH4LLM_DECRYPTED_VAULT_JSON" | jq -r --arg p "$prov" '.[$p] // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
    if [ -n "$extracted_key" ]; then
      current_key="$extracted_key"
      export "$envvar"="$current_key"
      if [ "$prov" = "groq" ] && [ "$envvar" != "GROQ_API_KEY" ]; then
        export GROQ_API_KEY="$current_key"
      fi
      return 0
    else
      log_warn "SECURITY" "No saved API key found in vault for provider: $prov"
    fi
  else
    log_warn "SECURITY" "Authentication failed. Falling back to manual input."
    BASH4LLM_DECRYPTED_VAULT_JSON=""
  fi
fi
if [ ! -t 0 ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: missing API key for provider %s (env %s) in non-interactive mode\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$prov" "$envvar" >&2
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
fi
printf 'Enter API key for provider %s (env %s): ' "$prov" "$envvar" >&2
if ! IFS= read -r input_key; then
  printf '\nbash4llm: %sERROR%s: no input received. Aborting.\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
fi
input_key="${input_key//$$'\r'/}"
input_key="${input_key//$$'\n'/}"
local rx_export='^[[:space:]]*[eE][xX][pO][rR][tT][[:space:]]+(.*)$'
if [[ "$input_key" =~ $rx_export ]]; then
  input_key="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
fi
local rx_assign='^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=['"'"'"]?([^'"'"'"]*).*$'
if [[ "$input_key" =~ $rx_assign ]]; then
  input_key="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
fi
if [ -z "$input_key" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: API key required. Aborting.\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
fi
export "$envvar"="$input_key"
if [ "$prov" = "groq" ] && [ "$envvar" != "GROQ_API_KEY" ]; then
  export GROQ_API_KEY="$input_key"
fi
printf '%b' "\n${C_BCYAN}----------------------------------------${C_RST}\n\nTo avoid re-entering the key for subsequent invocations, run this in your shell:\n\n  ${C_BGREEN}export ${envvar}=\"${input_key}\"${C_RST}\n\nYou can add that line to your shell profile (e.g., ${C_YELLOW}~/.bashrc${C_RST} or ${C_YELLOW}~/.profile${C_RST}) to persist it across sessions.\n\n${C_BCYAN}----------------------------------------${C_RST}\n\n" >&2
return 0

if is_truthy "${DRY_RUN:-0}" || is_truthy "${BASH4LLM_SKIP_NETWORK:-0}"; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "NETWORK" "Network calls disabled by DRY_RUN or BASH4LLM_SKIP_NETWORK; skipping HTTP."
  fi
  return 1
fi
if is_truthy "${BASH4LLM_ENFORCE_NO_NETWORK_IF_QUIET:-0}" && is_truthy "${QUIET:-0}"; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "NETWORK" "Network calls disabled due to QUIET policy."
  fi
  return 1
fi
return 0
printf '%s: ' "$SCRIPT_NAME"

local code="${1:-INFO}" msg="${2:-}"
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '%s%sINFO%s: %s: %s\n' "$(log_prefix)" "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}" "$code" "$msg" >&2
fi
if [ -n "$BASH4LLM_LOG" ]; then printf '%s INFO %s %s\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$code" "$msg" >>"$BASH4LLM_LOG" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

local code="${1:-WARN}" msg="${2:-}"
printf '%s%sWARN%s: %s: %s\n' "$(log_prefix)" "${C_BYELLOW}" "${C_RST}" "$code" "$msg" >&2
if [ -n "$BASH4LLM_LOG" ]; then printf '%s WARN %s %s\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$code" "$msg" >>"$BASH4LLM_LOG" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

local code="${1:-ERROR}" msg="${2:-}"
printf '%s%sERROR%s: %s: %s\n' "$(log_prefix)" "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$code" "$msg" >&2
if [ -n "$BASH4LLM_LOG" ]; then printf '%s ERROR %s %s\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$code" "$msg" >>"$BASH4LLM_LOG" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

local code="${1:-INFO}" msg="${2:-}"
if [ "${QUIET:-0}" -ne 1 ]; then
  printf '%s%sINFO%s: %s: %s\n' "$(log_prefix)" "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}" "$code" "$msg" >&2
fi
if [ -n "$BASH4LLM_LOG" ]; then
  printf '%s INFO_USER %s %s\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$code" "$msg" >>"$BASH4LLM_LOG" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -ne 0 ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$*" >&2
fi

safe_mkdir "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}" 700
if ! : > "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}/.bash4llm_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null; then
  log_error "CONFIG" "config dir not writable: ${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}"
  return 1
else
  rm -f "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}/.bash4llm_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
return 0

local prov="${1:-}" url="${2:-}" file="" dir="" tmp=""
[ -z "$prov" ] && return 1
[ -z "$url" ] && return 1
file="$(canonical_provider_url_file)"
dir="$(dirname "$file")"
safe_mkdir "$dir" 700
if [ -f "$file" ] && [ -s "$file" ]; then
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ] && [ -d "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  tmp="$(mktemp "${RUN_TMPDIR%/}/provider-url.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)"
else
  tmp="$(mktemp 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
if [ -n "$tmp" ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$url" > "$tmp"
  mv -f "$tmp" "$file" 2>/dev/null || cp -f "$tmp" "$file" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true; return 1; }
  chmod 600 "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 0
else
  printf '%s\n' "$url" > "$file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  chmod 600 "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 0
fi

local prov="${1:-${PROVIDER:-}}" prov_file="" prov_val="" cfgdir=""
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_API_URL:-}" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL="${BASH4LLM_API_URL}"
  export BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then
  return 0
fi
prov_file="$(canonical_provider_url_file)"
if [ -f "$prov_file" ] && [ -s "$prov_file" ]; then
  prov_val="$(sed -n '1p' "$prov_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
  if [ -n "$prov_val" ]; then
    BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL="$prov_val"
    export BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL
    return 0
  fi
fi
if [ "${prov:-}" = "groq" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL="https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions"
  export BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL
  return 0
fi
return 1

local prov="${1:-}" prov_upper=""
prov_upper="${prov^^}"
prov_upper="${prov_upper//[!A-Z0-9_]/_}"
printf '%s' "${prov_upper}_API_KEY"

local s="${1:-}"
[ -n "${s:-}" ] || return 1
printf '%s' "$s" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1

if command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  openssl enc -base64 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n'
else
  base64 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n'
fi

if command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  awk '{gsub(/.{64}/,"&\n")}1' | openssl enc -base64 -d 2>/dev/null
else
  if [ -n "${B64_DECODE_OPT:-}" ]; then
    base64 ${B64_DECODE_OPT}
  else
    base64 -d
  fi
fi

local f="${1:-}"
if [ -z "$f" ] || [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
  printf '0'
  return 0
fi
if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
  stat -f %z "$f" 2>/dev/null || printf '0'
else
  stat -c %s "$f" 2>/dev/null || printf '0'
fi

local f="${1:-}"
[ -f "$f" ] || return 1
[ -s "$f" ] || return 1
jq -e . "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1

local src="" dst="" max_bytes="" tmp_local="" tmp_b64="" workdir="" size="" tmp_local_is_temp=0 lockfile=""
if [ "$#" -eq 2 ]; then
  src="$1"; dst="$2"
elif [ "$#" -eq 1 ]; then
  dst="$1"; src=""
else
  log_error "STAGE" "stage_b64 usage: stage_b64 [src] dst"
  return 1
fi
max_bytes="${MAX_STAGE_BYTES:-10485760}"
[ -n "$dst" ] || return 1
workdir="$(dirname "$dst")"
safe_mkdir "$workdir" 700
if [ -n "$src" ]; then
  if [ ! -f "$src" ] || [ ! -s "$src" ]; then
    log_error "STAGE" "stage_b64: source payload missing or empty: $src"
    return 1
  fi
  tmp_local="$src"
else
  tmp_local="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" payload.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || {
    log_error "STAGE" "failed to allocate tmp_local"
    return 1
  }
  if ! cat - > "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null; then
    rm -f -- "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || true
    log_error "STAGE" "failed to write staging payload from stdin"
    return 1
  fi
  tmp_local_is_temp=1
fi
size="$(file_size "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
if [ "$size" -gt "$max_bytes" ]; then
  log_error "STAGE" "staged payload exceeds max allowed size ($size > $max_bytes)"
  [ "$tmp_local_is_temp" -eq 1 ] && rm -f -- "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi
tmp_b64="$(_tmpf file "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" .groq-b64 2>/dev/null)" || {
  [ "$tmp_local_is_temp" -eq 1 ] && rm -f -- "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_error "STAGE" "failed to allocate tmp_b64"
  return 1
}
if base64 "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n' > "$tmp_b64"; then
  :
else
  rm -f -- "$tmp_b64" 2>/dev/null || true
  if [ "$tmp_local_is_temp" -eq 1 ]; then
    rm -f -- "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  return 1
fi
chmod 600 "$tmp_b64" 2>/dev/null || true
lockfile="${workdir%/}/.bash4llm.lock"
lock_exec "$lockfile" 10 -- mv -f -- "$tmp_b64" "$dst" || {
  rm -f -- "$tmp_local" "$tmp_b64" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
}
chmod 600 "$dst" 2>/dev/null || true
[ "$tmp_local_is_temp" -eq 1 ] && rm -f -- "$tmp_local" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "STAGE" "staged base64 payload: $dst (size $(wc -c < "$dst" 2>/dev/null)B)"
fi
return 0

local lockfile="${1:-}"
local timeout="${2:-10}"
local rc=""
shift 2
if [ "$1" != "--" ]; then
  log_error "USAGE" "lock_exec <lockfile> <timeout> -- <cmd> [args...]"
  return 2
fi
shift
if [ -L "$lockfile" ]; then
  log_error "SEC" "lockfile is a symlink: $lockfile. Aborting."
  exit 15
fi
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$lockfile")" 700
local use_flock=0
if command -v flock >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 0 ]; then
  use_flock=1
fi
if [ "$use_flock" -eq 1 ]; then
  (
    exec 9>"$lockfile"
    if flock -x -w "$timeout" 9 2>/dev/null; then
      set -e
      "$@"
    else
      log_error "LOCKTIMEOUT" "could not acquire lock on $lockfile within $timeout seconds"
      exit 124
    fi
  )
  rc=$?
  return "$rc"
else
  local lockdir="${lockfile}.lockdir"
  local start_time="" now="" acquired=0 lock_mtime="" age=""
  lock_mtime=$(_file_mtime "$lockdir")
  if [ "$lock_mtime" -gt 0 ]; then
    now=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    age=$((now - lock_mtime))
    if [ "$age" -gt 15 ]; then
      rmdir "$lockdir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$lockdir" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
  fi
  start_time=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  acquired=0
  while :; do
    if mkdir "$lockdir" 2>/dev/null; then
      acquired=1
      break
    fi
    now=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    if [ $((now - start_time)) -ge "$timeout" ]; then
      break
    fi
    sleep 0.1 2>/dev/null || sleep 1
  done
  if [ "$acquired" -eq 1 ]; then
    (
      set -e
      "$@"
    )
    rc=$?
    rmdir "$lockdir" 2>/dev/null || true
    return "$rc"
  else
    log_error "LOCKTIMEOUT" "could not acquire directory-based lock on $lockdir within $timeout seconds"
    return 124
  fi
fi

local base="${1:-}" prefix="${2:-groq}" tmp=""
if [ -z "$base" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_mktemp_in_dir: base dir required"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
tmp="$(_tmpf file "$base" "$prefix" 2>/dev/null)"
if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_mktemp_in_dir: failed to create temp in $base"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
printf '%s' "$tmp"
return 0

local path="${1:-$PAYLOAD}" lines="${2:-200}"
if [ -z "${path:-}" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: payload file missing: %s\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "<unset>" >&2
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ ! -e "$path" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: payload file missing: %s\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$path" >&2
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ ! -s "$path" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sINFO%s: payload exists but is empty: %s\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}" "$path" >&2
  return 0
fi
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sINFO%s: payload path: %s\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}" "$path" >&2
  printf 'bash4llm: %sINFO%s: payload (head %d lines):\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}" "$lines" >&2
  if [[ "$path" == *.b64 ]]; then
    b64decode < "$path" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$lines" >&2 || true
  else
    head -n "$lines" "$path" 2>/dev/null >&2 || true
  fi
fi
return 0

local dest="$1"
local timeout="${2:-10}"
[ -n "$dest" ] || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
local destdir="" tmp="" lockfile="" rc=""
destdir="$(dirname -- "$dest")"
safe_mkdir "$destdir" 700
lockfile="${destdir}/.bash4llm.lock"
tmp="$(mktemp "${destdir}/.groq-atomic.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null || mktemp "${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR:-$destdir}/.groq-atomic.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then
  log_error "ATOMICFAIL" "failed to create secure temporary file"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if ! cat - > "$tmp"; then
  rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_error "ATOMICFAIL" "writing to temp failed"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
chmod 600 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
lock_exec "$lockfile" "$timeout" -- mv -f -- "$tmp" "$dest" || {
  rc=$?
  rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  return "$rc"
}
chmod 600 "$dest" 2>/dev/null || true
return 0

local resp_file="${RESP:-}" tmp_copy=""
if [ -z "${resp_file:-}" ]; then
  log_error "EXTRACT" "RESP path not set"
  return 1
fi
tmp_copy="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" resp_copy 2>/dev/null)" || return 1
cp -f "$resp_file" "$tmp_copy" 2>/dev/null || return 1
resp_file="$tmp_copy"
if ! is_valid_json_file "$resp_file"; then
  log_warn "EXTRACT" "RESP missing or not valid JSON: $resp_file"
  if [ -f "$resp_file" ]; then
    cat "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || true
    return 0
  fi
  return 1
fi
if jq -e 'has("diagnostic") and .diagnostic==true' "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log_warn "EXTRACT" "RESP is diagnostic JSON; skipping text extraction"
  return 2
fi
if jq -e '.choices and (.choices|length>0) and ( [ .choices[]? | (.message?.content // .delta?.content // "") ] | map(select(.!="")) | length > 0 )' "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '[.choices[]? | (.message?.content // .delta?.content // "")] | map(select(.!="")) | join("\n\n")' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  return 0
fi
if jq -e '.choices and (.choices|length>0) and ( [ .choices[]? | (.text? // "") ] | map(select(.!="")) | length > 0 )' "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '[.choices[]?.text? // empty] | map(select(.!="")) | join("\n\n")' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  return 0
fi
if jq -e '(.output_text? // empty) != "" or (.data and (.data|length>0) and ( [ .data[]? | (.text? // "") ] | map(select(.!="")) | length > 0 ))' "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if [ "$(jq -r '.output_text // empty' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null)" != "" ]; then
    jq -r '.output_text' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
    return 0
  else
    jq -r '[.data[]?.text? // empty] | map(select(.!="")) | join("\n\n")' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
    return 0
  fi
fi
if jq -e 'paths(scalars) as $p | getpath($p) | type=="string"' "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '[.. | scalars | select(type=="string")] | join("\n\n")' "$resp_file" 2>/dev/null || return 1
  return 0
fi
log_warn "EXTRACT" "No textual content found in RESP"
return 1

local rc_in=$?
stty echo 2>/dev/null || true
if type release_thread_lock >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  release_thread_lock 2>/dev/null || true
fi
if [ -n "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  rm -rf "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}"/thread-msg-*.lockdir 2>/dev/null || true
fi
if [ "${DEBUG_PRESERVE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ] && log_info "TMP" "DEBUG_PRESERVE set; preserving RUN_TMPDIR=$RUN_TMPDIR"
  return "$rc_in"
fi
if [ -n "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  case "$RUN_TMPDIR" in
    "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"/*|"$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR")
      rm -rf -- "$RUN_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true
      [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ] && log_info "TMP" "Cleaned RUN_TMPDIR: $RUN_TMPDIR"
      ;;
    *)
      [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ] && log_info "TMP" "RUN_TMPDIR outside BASH4LLM_TMPDIR; not removed: $RUN_TMPDIR"
      ;;
  esac
fi
return "$rc_in"

local print_only=0 subshell=0 tmpdir=""
if [ "${1:-}" = "--print" ]; then print_only=1; fi
if [ -n "${BASHPID:-}" ] && [ "${BASHPID:-}" != "$$" ]; then
  subshell=1
fi
if [ -n "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ] && [ -d "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  case "$RUN_TMPDIR" in
    "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"/*|"$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR")
      chmod 700 "$RUN_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true
      : "${PAYLOAD:=$RUN_TMPDIR/payload}"
      : "${RESP:=$RUN_TMPDIR/resp.json}"
      : "${ERRF:=$RUN_TMPDIR/err.log}"
      if [ "$print_only" -eq 0 ] && [ "$subshell" -eq 0 ]; then
        : > "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
        chmod 600 "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
        : > "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true
        chmod 600 "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true
        export RUN_TMPDIR PAYLOAD RESP ERRF
      fi
      [ "$print_only" -eq 1 ] && printf '%s' "$RUN_TMPDIR"
      return 0
      ;;
    *)
      log_warn "TMP" "existing RUN_TMPDIR outside BASH4LLM_TMPDIR; discarding: $RUN_TMPDIR"
      RUN_TMPDIR=""
      ;;
  esac
fi
if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "BASH4LLM_TMPDIR not set"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" 700
tmpdir="$(_tmpf dir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" run 2>/dev/null)" || {
  log_error "TMP" "ensure_run_tmpdir: _tmpf failed to create run tmpdir"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
}
RUN_TMPDIR="$tmpdir"
: "${PAYLOAD:=$RUN_TMPDIR/payload}"
: "${RESP:=$RUN_TMPDIR/resp.json}"
: "${ERRF:=$RUN_TMPDIR/err.log}"
if [ "$print_only" -eq 0 ] && [ "$subshell" -eq 0 ]; then
  : > "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
  chmod 600 "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
  : > "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true
  chmod 600 "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
if [ "$subshell" -eq 0 ] && [ "$print_only" -eq 0 ]; then
  trap cleanup_run_tmp_on_exit EXIT INT TERM
fi
if [ "$print_only" -eq 0 ]; then
  export RUN_TMPDIR PAYLOAD RESP ERRF
  [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ] && log_info "TMP" "Created RUN_TMPDIR: $RUN_TMPDIR"
else
  printf '%s' "$tmpdir"
fi
return 0

local dest="$1"
local timeout="${2:-10}"
[ -n "$dest" ] || {
  log_error "B64FAIL" "b64_atomic_write: dest required"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
}
local tmp=""
tmp="$(_tmpf file "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" .groq-b64 2>/dev/null)" || {
  log_error "B64FAIL" "failed to allocate tmp for b64_atomic_write"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
}
if ! b64encode > "$tmp"; then
  rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_error "B64FAIL" "base64 encoding failed"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
atomic_write "$dest" "$timeout" < "$tmp"
local rc=$?
rm -f -- "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
return "$rc"

local src="$1"
[ -f "$src" ] || return 1
b64decode < "$src"
return $?

local name="${1:-}" content="${2:-}" dir="" target=""
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR:-}" ]; then
  dir="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state"
else
  dir="${RUN_TMPDIR%/}/ui_state"
fi
if [ -z "${name:-}" ]; then
  log_error "UI_STATE" "ui_state_write requires a filename"
  return 1
fi
safe_mkdir "$dir" 700
target="$dir/$name"
printf '%s' "$content" | atomic_write "$target" 10 || { log_warn "UI_STATE" "atomic write failed for $target"; return 1; }
chmod 600 "$target" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "UI_STATE" "wrote $target (size $(wc -c < "$target" 2>/dev/null)B)"
fi
return 0

local config_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}/config"
local notes_file="${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR:-}/docs/core-notes.sh"
local security_failed=0
local warnings_found=0
local perm_string=""
local group_write=""
local others_write=""
local canonical_vars=""
local key=""
local val=""
local line=""
declare -A canonical_set=()
printf '%bChecking Bash4LLM⁺ Configuration Security...%b\n' "${C_BOLD}" "${C_RST}"
if [ -f "$config_file" ]; then
  if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
    perm_string="$(stat -f %Sp "$config_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  else
    perm_string="$(stat -c %A "$config_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  fi
  if [ -n "$perm_string" ]; then
    group_write="$(printf '%s' "$perm_string" | awk '{print substr($0,6,1)}')"
    others_write="$(printf '%s' "$perm_string" | awk '{print substr($0,9,1)}')"
    if [ "$group_write" = "w" ] || [ "$others_write" = "w" ]; then
      printf '  [%sSECURITY ERROR%s] Config file is writable by group/others: %s (%s)\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$config_file" "$perm_string" >&2
      security_failed=1
    else
      printf '  [%sOK%s] Configuration file permissions are secure.\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}"
    fi
  fi
else
  printf '  [%sINFO%s] Local config file not present. Using runtime defaults.\n' "${C_CYAN}" "${C_RST}"
fi
canonical_vars="$(_extract_notes_section "Important names (use exact names):" || true)"
if [ -z "$canonical_vars" ]; then
  printf '  [%sWARNING%s] Unable to read core-notes.sh. Skipping variable linter.\n' "${C_YELLOW}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  printf '  Please install extras with: %s --install-extras\n\n' "$0" >&2
else
  while IFS= read -r var; do
    [ -n "$var" ] && canonical_set["$var"]=1
  done <<EOF
$(printf '%s' "$canonical_vars" | sed -E 's/\([^)]*\)//g; s/\.//g' | tr -d ' ' | tr ',' '\n' | grep -v '^$')
EOF
  if [ -f "$config_file" ] && [ -s "$config_file" ]; then
    printf '\n%bLinting Configuration Keys...%b\n' "${C_BOLD}" "${C_RST}"
    while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do
      case "$line" in ''|\#*) continue ;; esac
      key="${line%%=*}"
      key="${key#"${key%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
      key="${key%"${key##*[![:space:]]}"}"
      if [ -n "$key" ]; then
        if [ "$key" = "TEMP" ]; then
          printf '  [%sWARNING%s] Restricted variable "TEMP" detected. Please use "TURE" or "TEMPERATURE" to avoid conflicts with temporary paths.\n' "${C_YELLOW}" "${C_RST}"
          warnings_found=$((warnings_found + 1))
        elif [ -z "${canonical_set[$key]:-}" ]; then
          printf '  [%sWARNING%s] Unknown or typo-prone variable found: "%s"\n' "${C_YELLOW}" "${C_RST}" "$key"
          warnings_found=$((warnings_found + 1))
        fi
      fi
    done < "$config_file"
  fi
fi
if [ "$security_failed" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '\n%sCRITICAL ERROR%s: Security validation failed. Fix directory/file permissions before running.\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_SEC"
fi
if [ "$warnings_found" -gt 0 ]; then
  printf '\nConfiguration scan completed with %d warnings. Active execution is safe.\n' "$warnings_found"
else
  printf '\n%sConfiguration is secure and valid.%s\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}"
fi

local input_code="${1:-}"
local error_defs=""
local operational_tips=""
local matched=""
if [ -z "$input_code" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: --explain-error requires an error code or alias.\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  exit 2
fi
error_defs="$(_extract_notes_section "Error Code Constants & Direct Alias Mappings:" || true)"
operational_tips="$(_extract_notes_section "OPERATIONAL TIPS (concise)" || true)"
if [ -z "$error_defs" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sWARNING%s: Unable to load core-notes.sh document. Cannot explain error.\n' "${C_YELLOW}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  printf 'Please install extras with: %s --install-extras\n' "$0" >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf '%bEvaluating error code / alias: %s%b\n\n' "${C_BOLD}" "$input_code" "${C_RST}"
matched="$(printf '%s' "$error_defs" | grep -E "\b${input_code}\b" || true)"
if [ -n "$matched" ]; then
  printf '%sFormal definition found:%s\n' "${C_GREEN}" "${C_RST}"
  printf '  %s\n\n' "$matched"
  printf '%sOperational Mitigation Advice:%s\n' "${C_CYAN}" "${C_RST}"
  if [ "$input_code" = "15" ] || [[ "$input_code" == *"BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"* ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips" | grep -Ei "perm|temp|tmp|_tmpf" || printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips"
  elif [ "$input_code" = "10" ] || [[ "$input_code" == *"BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"* ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips" | grep -Ei "api|key|prov" || printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips"
  elif [ "$input_code" = "17" ] || [[ "$input_code" == *"BASH4LLM_ERR_SEC"* ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips" | grep -Ei "perm|chmod|sec|check" || printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips"
  else
    printf '%s\n' "$operational_tips"
  fi
else
  printf 'No exact documentation mapping found for: %s\n' "$input_code" >&2
fi

local provider="${1:-}"
local current_user="" owner="" file_owner="" perms="" group_write="" others_write="" beforesig="" aftersig="" dump_file="" rc=0 _nounset_was_on=0 supports_streaming=0 supports_refresh_models=0 loaded_from="" prov_json=""
if [ "${LOADED_PROVIDER_NAME:-}" = "$provider" ] && [ "${PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  sync_models_file_path "$provider"
  return 0
fi
LOADED_PROVIDER_NAME="$provider"
PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED=0
PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH="$PROVIDERS_DIR/${provider}.sh"
PROVIDER_DIR="$PROVIDERS_DIR"
safe_mkdir "$PROVIDER_DIR" 700
local ignore_sec=0
if [ "${BASH4LLM_PLAT_WSL:-0}" -eq 1 ] || is_truthy "${BASH4LLM_IGNORE_SEC_CHECKS:-0}"; then
  ignore_sec=1
fi
if _is_world_writable "$PROVIDER_DIR"; then
  if [ "$ignore_sec" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_warn "SEC" "provider directory is world-writable (ignored due to WSL/policy)."
  else
    log_error "SEC" "provider directory is world-writable."
    return 1
  fi
fi
current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || printf '')"
owner="$(_get_owner "$PROVIDER_DIR")"
[ -n "$owner" ] && [ "$owner" != "$current_user" ] && log_warn "SEC" "provider directory owned by $owner"
if [ ! -f "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" ]; then
  if [ "$provider" != "groq" ]; then
    printf 'Provider %s is not installed.\n' "$provider" >&2
    PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED=0
    return 0
  else
    PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED=1
    return 0
  fi
fi
if [ -L "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" ]; then
  log_error "SEC" "provider file is symlink."
  return 1
fi
file_owner="$(_get_owner "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH")"
if [ -n "$file_owner" ] && [ "$file_owner" != "$current_user" ]; then
  if [ "$ignore_sec" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_warn "SEC" "wrong owner for provider file: $file_owner (ignored due to WSL/policy)."
  else
    log_error "SEC" "wrong owner for provider file."
    return 1
  fi
fi
perms="$(_get_perm_string "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH")"
group_write="$(printf '%s' "$perms" | awk '{print substr($0,6,1)}')"
others_write="$(printf '%s' "$perms" | awk '{print substr($0,9,1)}')"
if [ "$group_write" = "w" ] || [ "$others_write" = "w" ]; then
  if [ "$ignore_sec" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_warn "SEC" "provider file writable by group/world (ignored due to WSL/policy)."
  else
    log_error "SEC" "provider file writable by group/world."
    return 1
  fi
fi
beforesig="$(getfile_signature "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
if bash -n "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then
  dump_file="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" "provdump.${provider}.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -z "$dump_file" ] && { log_error "SEC" "cannot create provider dump file"; return 1; }
  (
    set -e
    trap 'rm -f "$dump_file.before.$$" "$dump_file.after.$$" "$dump_file.funcs.$$" 2>/dev/null' EXIT
    declare -F | awk '{print $3}' | sort > "$dump_file.before.$$" 2>/dev/null || true
    . "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH"
    declare -F | awk '{print $3}' | sort > "$dump_file.after.$$" 2>/dev/null || true
    comm -13 "$dump_file.before.$$" "$dump_file.after.$$" > "$dump_file.funcs.$$" 2>/dev/null || true
    req1="buildpayload_${provider}"
    req2="call_api_${provider}"
    for f in "$req1" "$req2"; do
      if ! grep -xq "$f" "$dump_file.funcs.$$" 2>/dev/null; then
        if ! type "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf 'ERROR: provider %s missing required function: %s\n' "$provider" "$f" >&2
          exit 99
        fi
      fi
    done
    : > "$dump_file"
    while IFS= read -r fn; do
      [ -z "$fn" ] && continue
      if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        declare -f "$fn" >> "$dump_file"
      fi
    done < "$dump_file.funcs.$$"
  )
  rc=$?
  if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "provider module failed isolation load (rc=$rc)"
    rm -f "$dump_file" 2>/dev/null || true
    return 1
  fi
  _nounset_was_on=0
  if (set -o | awk '/^nounset/ {print $2}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q on); then
    _nounset_was_on=1
    set +u
  fi
  . "$dump_file"
  if [ "$_nounset_was_on" -eq 1 ]; then
    set -u
  fi
  PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED=1
  rm -f "$dump_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  aftersig="$(getfile_signature "$PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  [ "$beforesig" != "$aftersig" ] && { log_error "SEC" "provider file changed."; return 1; }
else
  log_warn "PROVIDER" "provider module invalid; falling back to embedded provider."
  PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED=0
fi
if [ -n "${provider:-}" ]; then
  supports_streaming=0
  supports_refresh_models=0
  if type "call_api_streaming_groq" >/dev/null 2>&1 || type "call_api_streaming_${provider}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then supports_streaming=1; fi
  if type "refresh_models_${provider}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then supports_refresh_models=1; fi
  loaded_from="${PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH:-embedded}"
  prov_json="$(jq -c -n --arg p "$provider" --arg loaded "$loaded_from" --argjson sstream "$supports_streaming" --argjson srefresh "$supports_refresh_models" '{provider:$p, supports_streaming:$sstream, supports_refresh_models:$srefresh, loaded_from:$loaded}')"
  ui_state_write "provider_capabilities.json" "$prov_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write provider_capabilities for $provider"
fi
sync_models_file_path "$provider"
return 0

B64_WRAP_OPT=""
B64_DECODE_OPT="-d"
if printf '' | base64 -w0 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  B64_WRAP_OPT="-w0"
else
  B64_WRAP_OPT=""
fi
if printf 'dGVzdA==' | base64 -d 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'test'; then
  B64_DECODE_OPT="-d"
elif printf 'dGVzdA==' | base64 -D 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'test'; then
  B64_DECODE_OPT="-D"
else
  B64_DECODE_OPT="-d"
fi
export B64_WRAP_OPT B64_DECODE_OPT

local dir="${1:-}"
find "$dir" -type f -print0 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
  local mtime=""
  if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
    mtime="$(stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  else
    mtime="$(stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  fi
  printf '%s|%s\n' "$mtime" "$f"
done | sort -n

local f="${1:-}"
if command -v tac >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  tac "$f"
  return $?
fi
awk ' { lines[NR] = $0 } END { for (i=NR; i>0; i--) print lines[i] } ' "$f"
return 0

local f="${1:-}"
if [ ! -e "$f" ]; then printf '0'; return 0; fi
if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
  stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || printf '0'
else
  stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || printf '0'
fi

local filter="${1:-}" file="${2:-}" rc=""
if [ -z "$file" ] || [ ! -s "$file" ]; then
  return 1
fi
if ! jq -e "$filter" "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  rc=$?
  if [ -n "${ERRF:-}" ]; then
    jq "$filter" "$file" 2>>"$ERRF" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
  return "$rc"
fi
return 0

blocks.body:
if [ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" = "$0" ]; then
  set -euo pipefail
fi
ulimit -c 0 2>/dev/null || true
SCRIPT_NAME="bash4llm"
SCRIPT_VERSION="2.5.0"
SCRIPT_DATE="2026-07-18"

BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID=0
BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS=0
BASH4LLM_PLAT_WSL=0
BASH4LLM_PLAT_CYGWIN=0
BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD=0
BASH4LLM_PLAT_LINUX=0
_uname_s="$(uname -s 2>/dev/null || echo "Linux")"
_uname_o="$(uname -o 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
_uname_r="$(uname -r 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
if [ -n "${TERMUX_VERSION:-}" ] || [ -d "/data/data/com.termux" ] || [[ "$_uname_o" == *"Android"* ]] || [[ "$(uname -a 2>/dev/null)" == *"Android"* ]] || [ -f /system/build.prop ]; then
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID=1
elif [ "$_uname_s" = "Darwin" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS=1
elif [[ "$_uname_s" == *"CYGWIN"* ]] || [[ "$_uname_s" == *"MSYS"* ]] || [[ "$_uname_s" == *"MINGW"* ]]; then
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_CYGWIN=1
elif [[ "$_uname_s" == *"BSD"* ]] || [ "$_uname_s" = "DragonFly" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD=1
elif [[ "$_uname_r" == *"microsoft"* ]] || [[ "$_uname_r" == *"Microsoft"* ]]; then
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_WSL=1
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_LINUX=1
else
  BASH4LLM_PLAT_LINUX=1
fi
export BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS BASH4LLM_PLAT_WSL BASH4LLM_PLAT_CYGWIN BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD BASH4LLM_PLAT_LINUX
declare -A BASH4LLM_MODEL_CACHE=()

for cmd in bash jq curl mktemp stat base64 find awk sed grep xargs tr sort head wc tee date mv chmod cp rm printf comm; do
  if ! command -v "$cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: required command not found: %s\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$cmd" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
done

SCRIPTDIR="$(resolve_script_dir)"
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_DIR:-}" ]; then
  :
elif [ -n "${BASH4LLM_ROOT:-}" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_DIR="${BASH4LLM_ROOT%/}/bash4llm.d"
else
  BASH4LLM_DIR="$SCRIPTDIR/bash4llm.d"
fi
BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR}/config}"
BASH4LLM_MODELS_DIR="${BASH4LLM_MODELS_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR}/models}"
BASH4LLM_TEMPLATES_DIR="${BASH4LLM_TEMPLATES_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR}/templates}"
BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR}/history}"
BASH4LLM_TMPDIR="${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR:-${BASH4LLM_DIR}/tmp}"
sync_models_file_path
MAX_MODELS="${MAX_MODELS:-200}"
CANONICAL_EXTRAS_DIR="${BASH4LLM_DIR}/extras"
LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR="${SCRIPTDIR%/}/extras"
BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR="${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR:-${CANONICAL_EXTRAS_DIR}}"
PROVIDERS_DIR="${PROVIDERS_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR}/providers}"
export BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR PROVIDERS_DIR
if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_DIR:-}" ]; then
  printf 'bash4llm: ERROR: BASH4LLM_DIR is empty; cannot derive directories\n' >&2
  exit "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
fi
case "${BASH4LLM_DIR:-}" in
  /tmp|/tmp/*)
    printf 'bash4llm: ERROR: BASH4LLM_DIR must not be /tmp or under /tmp: %s\n' "${BASH4LLM_DIR}" >&2
    exit "${BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP:-15}"
    ;;
esac
if [ "${BASH4LLM_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" = "$0" ]; then
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_MODELS_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_TEMPLATES_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR/providers" 700
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/threads" 700
fi
THREAD_DIR="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR}/threads"

_BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_HELPER="${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR}/security/openssl-helper.sh"
BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE=0
_local_cfg="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}/config"
if [ -f "$_local_cfg" ]; then
  _cfg_vault_val="$(awk -F= '/^[[:space:]]*BASH4LLM_VAULT_ENABLED=/ {print $2; exit}' "$_local_cfg" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]')"
  if [ -n "$_cfg_vault_val" ]; then
    BASH4LLM_VAULT_ENABLED="$_cfg_vault_val"
  fi
fi
if [ "${BASH4LLM_VAULT_ENABLED:-1}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -f "$_BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_HELPER" ] && [ -r "$_BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_HELPER" ]; then
    _is_symlink=0
    if [ -L "$_BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_HELPER" ]; then
      _is_symlink=1
    fi
    _ignore_sec=0
    case "${BASH4LLM_IGNORE_SEC_CHECKS:-0}" in
      1|true|TRUE|True|yes|YES|Yes) _ignore_sec=1 ;;
    esac
    if [ "$_is_symlink" -eq 0 ] || [ "$_ignore_sec" -eq 1 ]; then
      if . "$_BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_HELPER" 2>/dev/null; then
        if [ "${BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          export BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE
        fi
      fi
    fi
  fi
else
  BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE=0
fi

if [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; then
  i=1
  while [ "$i" -le "$#" ]; do
    arg="${!i}"
    case "$arg" in
      --check-config)
        run_static_config_check
        exit 0
        ;;
      --explain-error)
        next_index=$((i+1))
        if [ "$next_index" -le "$#" ]; then
          explain_error_code "${!next_index}"
          exit 0
        else
          printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: usage: --explain-error <error_code_or_alias>\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
          exit 2
        fi
        ;;
      --print-config-dir)
        printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_config_dir)"
        exit 0
        ;;
      --print-provider-file)
        printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_provider_file)"
        exit 0
        ;;
      --print-model-file)
        next_index=$((i+1))
        if [ "$next_index" -le "$#" ]; then
          prov="${!next_index}"
          printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_model_file "$prov")"
          exit 0
        else
          printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: usage: --print-model-file <provider>\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
          exit 2
        fi
        ;;
      --print-model-file=*)
        prov="${arg#--print-model-file=}"
        printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_model_file "$prov")"
        exit 0
        ;;
      --help|-h)
        break
        ;;
      *)
        ;;
    esac
    i=$((i+1))
  done
fi
umask 077
